revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:List of Shikinaisha]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (12 members)
Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:9世紀の日本の設立]] [[ar:Category:تأسيسات القرن 9 في اليابان]] [[commons:Category:Establishments in Japan in the 9th century]] [[fa:Category:بنیان‌گذاری‌های سده ۹ (میلادی) در ژاپن]] [[hy:Category:9-րդ դարի հիմնադրումներ Ճապոնիայում]] [[mr:Category:जपानमधील ९व्या शतकातील आस्थापने]] [[simple:Category:9th-century establishments in Japan]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Suwa Hachiman Shrine (Izumicho, Iwaki City)]].

revision.comment: Bot: log revisions ≥ 2025-05-13 with full text
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats

Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q15402809)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|" to "[[Category:qq|"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: append metadata & Tier-2 tag
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Establishment category in country by century|Japan}} {{wikidata link|Q15402809}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:9th-century establishments in Japan]] [[ja:Category:9世紀の日本の設立]] [[ar:Category:تأسيسات القرن 9 في اليابان]] [[commons:Category:Establishments in Japan in the 9th century]] [[fa:Category:بنیان‌گذاری‌های سده ۹ (میلادی) در ژاپن]] [[hy:Category:9-րդ դարի հիմնադրումներ Ճապոնիայում]] [[mr:Category:जपानमधील ९व्या शतकातील आस्थापने]] [[simple:Category:9th-century establishments in Japan]] <!--categories--> [[Category:9th-century establishments in Asia|Japan]]
